overall_goal: Move the kangaroo upward through platforms via reachable ladders to reach the child, while surviving monkeys and coconuts. Real reward should come from upward platform/ladder progress, not from punch-farming a single monkey on the start platform.

skills.name: select_reachable_ladder
skills.purpose: Pick an active ladder whose bottom is near the player's feet (reachable from the current platform) and whose top is above the player, so climbing actually advances upward.
activation_conditions: player is not currently centered inside a ladder column (no on_ladder condition true)
completion_signals: a ladder index is selected with abs((ladder_y[i]+ladder_h[i]) - (player_y+player_h)) < reach_y_tol
selected ladder has ladder_y[i] < player_y - min_climb_gain (real upward progress available)
horizontal distance abs(ladder_center_x[i] - (player_x + player_w*0.5)) is decreasing over steps
reward_terms: +w_reach_match if a ladder satisfies reach_y_tol AND upward_gain conditions (bounded indicator)
-w_wrong_ladder if selected ladder fails reach_y_tol (penalize picking the upper-platform ladder from start)
anti_shortcuts: Do not reward selecting the x-nearest ladder when its bottom y is far from player feet (start-position trap at x~20,y~84).
Do not reward when no ladder is active.

skills.name: horizontal_traverse_to_ladder
skills.purpose: Move LEFT or RIGHT along the current platform toward the selected reachable ladder's center, optionally with FIRE only if a monkey is within punch range on the path.
activation_conditions: a reachable ladder is selected by select_reachable_ladder
abs(player_y_bottom - ladder_bottom_y) < reach_y_tol (still on same platform level)
player not yet horizontally inside ladder center band
completion_signals: player_y unchanged (still on platform, not falling)
reward_terms: +w_punch_branch if a monkey is active with |monkey_x - player_x| < punch_range AND same_row(monkey_y, player_y) AND action is RIGHTFIRE/LEFTFIRE in correct facing (preserves stable-200 behavior)
-w_overshoot if player_center_x crosses ladder_center_x and reverses repeatedly
anti_shortcuts: Do not reward repeated LEFT/RIGHT oscillation near the start (the horizontal-only failure mode).
Do not reward FIRE when no monkey is within punch_range and same row (prevents punch-farming reward).
Punch reward must require near a ladder approach, not standalone.

skills.name: climb_ladder
skills.purpose: Once horizontally inside a ladder column with sufficient overlap, issue UP until reaching near the ladder top, then dismount.
activation_conditions: horizontal overlap fraction between player and ladder_x[i]..ladder_x[i]+ladder_w[i] >= overlap_frac_min
player_y > ladder_top_y + dismount_margin (still has room to climb)
completion_signals: player_y decreases toward ladder_top_y over consecutive steps
reward_terms: -w_false_climb if UP issued without overlap_frac_min satisfied
anti_shortcuts: Do not treat 1-pixel x overlap as on-ladder (overlap_frac_min must be a real fraction, e.g., >=0.4).
Do not reward UP when no ladder column overlaps the player.
Do not reward staying at the top forever; require dismount transition.

skills.name: dismount_and_replan
skills.purpose: After reaching the top of a ladder, step horizontally onto the new platform and trigger ladder reselection from the new platform level (handles the post-200 transition).
activation_conditions: player still inside or just above ladder column
completion_signals: abs((player_y+player_h) - new_platform_y) < platform_settle_tol on a different platform than before
select_reachable_ladder finds a new ladder with ladder_y < player_y
reward_terms: +w_new_platform when player_bottom_y matches a platform_y not previously occupied at this height
-w_fall if player_y increases by more than fall_threshold in one step
anti_shortcuts: Do not reward simply stepping off a ladder downward.
Do not reward repeatedly toggling on/off the top of the same ladder.

skills.name: avoid_hazards
skills.purpose: Detect nearby active falling coconuts, thrown coconuts, and aggressive monkeys, and choose a dodging or punching action without abandoning the climb route.
activation_conditions: falling_coconut_active==1 AND |falling_coconut_x - player_x| < hazard_x_tol AND falling_coconut_y between player_y - vert_window and player_y + player_h
any monkey_active[k]==1 with same row and within punch_range
completion_signals: hazard no longer satisfies proximity test in subsequent step
player_active still 1 (did not lose a life)
reward_terms: +w_dodge if hazard proximity decreases after action
+w_punch_hazard if FIRE action issued when monkey within punch_range AND same row AND facing correct
-w_hit if player_active transitions to 0 or player_y resets (life lost)
anti_shortcuts: Do not reward FIRE when no hazard is in punch_range (punch-farming prevention).
Do not reward dodging by walking off the route entirely; combine with horizontal_traverse skill so dodging stays near ladder target.

selection_rules: If a hazard satisfies avoid_hazards activation_conditions, run avoid_hazards (but bias action choice to keep moving toward current ladder target).
Else, if on_ladder_column(obs, selected_i) with overlap_frac_min and player_y > ladder_top_y + dismount_margin, run climb_ladder.
Else, if player_y <= last_ladder_top_y + dismount_margin and just finished a climb, run dismount_and_replan.
Else, if a reachable ladder is already selected and player is on its platform but not in its center band, run horizontal_traverse_to_ladder.
Else run select_reachable_ladder to (re)pick a ladder index.
skill_selector.fallback_behavior: If no ladder is reachable (no ladder satisfies reach_y_tol with upward gain), output NOOP or a small horizontal probe action; never default to UP-only or LEFT/RIGHT-only oscillation, and never default to FIRE.

dense_reward_design.composition_rule: Bounded weighted sum: dense = clip( w1*select_reachable_ladder.reward_terms + w2*horizontal_traverse_to_ladder.reward_terms + w3*climb_ladder.reward_terms + w4*dismount_and_replan.reward_terms + w5*avoid_hazards.reward_terms, -1, 1 ), where each skill's reward terms are themselves clipped to [-1,1] before weighting.
must_include: Upward progress signal based on decrease of player_y across episode (height_gain).
Ladder-reachability indicator using reach_y_tol on ladder bottom vs player_bottom_y.
Hazard penalty tied to player_active loss or sudden player_y reset.
must_not_include: Raw Euclidean distance from player to child as the sole shaping (ignores ladders/platforms).
Reward for FIRE actions independent of monkey proximity (encourages punch-farming).
Reward for selecting the x-nearest ladder regardless of y reachability.
Reward for holding UP without ladder column overlap.
Reward for left/right oscillation without dx progress toward selected ladder.
dense_reward_design.real_reward_relationship: The shaped reward is a denser proxy for real Kangaroo score: real points come from punching nearby monkeys, collecting fruits/bell, and ultimately reaching the child. The shaping rewards the route structure (reachable-ladder selection, traversal, climb, dismount, hazard handling) that makes those real-reward events reachable, while explicitly penalizing the known degenerate strategies (UP-only, horizontal-only oscillation, x-nearest ladder trap, and lower-platform punch-farming) so that CMA-ES-tuned parameters generalize to actual upward progress instead of exploiting a single high-reward shortcut.

alignment_risks: Punch-farming a lower-platform monkey with RIGHTFIRE produces high real score with zero upward progress; reward must require the punch to be on the route to a reachable ladder.
Holding UP gives 1-pixel ladder overlap and zero real progress; overlap_frac_min must be a true fraction.
Selecting the x-nearest ladder at start picks the wrong (upper-platform) ladder and wastes the episode.
Over-rewarding height_gain alone could push the agent off platforms via jumps that lose lives.
Aggressive rewrites of the early route keep regressing the stable-200 baseline; the punch-near-first-ladder branch must be preserved.
Pure final-goal distance to child ignores platform/ladder topology and can incentivize wall-hugging.
implementation_notes: Compute player_center_x = player_x + 0.5*player_w and player_bottom_y = player_y + player_h every step.
Compute ladder_bottom_y[i] = ladder_y[i] + ladder_h[i] and ladder_center_x[i] = ladder_x[i] + 0.5*ladder_w[i]; gate by ladder_active[i]==1.
select_reachable_ladder must filter ladders by both abs(ladder_bottom_y - player_bottom_y) < reach_y_tol AND ladder_y < player_y - min_climb_gain before any x-distance tiebreak.
Use ladder_overlap_fraction = max(0, min(player_x+player_w, ladder_x+ladder_w) - max(player_x, ladder_x)) / max(1, player_w); require >= overlap_frac_min (e.g., tunable around 0.4) before issuing UP.
Track previous-step player_y and selected ladder index in a tiny policy state (allowed as policy-internal memory, not env RAM) to compute dx_progress and climb_dy.

Preserve the stable-200 RIGHTFIRE branch: when horizontal_traverse_to_ladder's selected ladder is to the right and a monkey is within punch_range on the same row, allow RIGHTFIRE; this is the documented preservation contract.
When designing fallback, never emit UP-only or pure LEFT/RIGHT oscillation patterns; default to NOOP plus a small probe.
All reward terms should be clipped per-term to [-1,1] before weighted sum to keep CMA-ES optimization well-conditioned.

Treat post-200 changes as additive: only activate dismount_and_replan and post-top behaviors when climb_ladder's top_reached indicator has fired in the current episode, so early-route behavior is unchanged.
